## openclaw-event-server-plugin v1.0.2

This patch release improves release reliability and does not change runtime behavior.

### Fixed
- Stabilized Tool Guard integration timing test in CI by waiting explicitly for the `tool.guard.blocked` event before asserting payload details.

### Why this release
- `v1.0.1` failed in CI due to a race in one integration assertion.
- This update removes the flake so tagged releases can publish consistently.
